title: Migratory birds regulatory report series - Canada.ca
content:
## Migratory birds regulatory report series
We produce 3 reports to support our national consultation process on changes to the migratory game bird hunting regulations.

## For the 2026-2027 and 2027-2028 hunting seasons
- Proposals to Amend the Canadian Migratory Birds Regulations: 2026
- Population status of migratory game birds in Canada - 2025

## For the 2024-2025 and 2025-2026 hunting seasons
- Migratory Birds Regulations in Canada: 2024
- Proposals to Amend the Canadian Migratory Birds Regulations: 2024
- Population status of migratory game birds in Canada - 2023

## For the 2022-2023 and 2023-2024 hunting seasons
- Migratory Birds Regulations in Canada: 2022
- Proposals to Amend the Canadian Migratory Birds Regulations: 2022
- Population status of migratory game birds in Canada - 2021

## For the 2020-2021 and 2021-2022 hunting seasons
- Migratory Birds Regulations in Canada: July 2020
For copies of Migratory Birds Regulatory Reports from previous hunting seasons, please consult the Government of Canada’s Publications Catalogue .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
